plain_english: Whirl base family: a 3-ADD rotational trick used as the foundation for many compounds.
Mirage base family: a 2-ADD foundational rotational trick.
Osis base family: a 3-ADD compound that anchors torque + blender sub-families.
Torque base family: a 4-ADD compound; canonically miraging osis.
Butterfly base family: a 3-ADD intersection of dexterity and compound technique.
Eggbeater (canonically atomic legover): a 3-ADD compound.
Legover base family: a 2-ADD body trick anchoring eggbeater + flurry.
Pickup base family: a 2-ADD foundational trick (a core entry).
Blender (canonically whirling osis): a 4-ADD compound.
Drifter (canonically miraging clipper): a 3-ADD compound.
Barfly: a 4-ADD named compound (infinity family).
Swirl base family: a 3-ADD rotational trick.
Within operational notation: a rotational dex-component step (NOT the base trick). Fuses with FRONT/BACK as a 2-token rotation variant.
Within operational notation: a rotational dex-component step (NOT the base trick). Fuses with FRONT/BACK.
Body modifier adding +1 ADD. Structurally an in-then-out dex pair.
Body modifier adding +1 ADD. Structurally a forward-then-back paradox.
Body modifier adding +1 ADD. Duck body action interleaved between dexes.
Body modifier adding +1 ADD. A step action interleaved into the trick.
Body modifier adding +1 ADD. Distinct from Stepping per Red pt3.
Body modifier adding +1 ADD. Dive body action interleaved.
Body modifier adding +1 ADD.
Body modifier adding +1 ADD. The Flurry name decomposes as Barraging Legover.
Body modifier adding +1 ADD.
Body modifier adding +1 ADD. Underlies named tricks: drifter (miraging clipper), torque (miraging osis), DLO (miraging legover).
Body modifier adding +1 ADD (Symposium-equivalent per Red pt9). NOT a direction term.
Body modifier adding +3 ADD per Red pt8.
Rotation modifier adding +1 ADD (flat per pt10; was +2 on rotational base).
Rotation modifier adding +1 ADD (flat per pt10). Underlies blender (whirling osis).
Rotation modifier adding +1 ADD (flat per pt10).
Rotation modifier distinct from Spinning per Red pt3.
Rotation modifier adding +1 ADD. Underlies mobius (gyro torque).
Set modifier adding +1 ADD (flat per pt11; was +2 on rotational base).
Set modifier adding +1 non-rotational / +2 on rotational base.
Set modifier adding +2 ADD. Structurally Paradox + Atomic per Red pt10.
Set modifier adding +1 ADD universally per Red pt10.
Set modifier adding +1 ADD universally.
Set modifier adding +1 ADD universally.
Set modifier adding +1 non-rotational / +2 on rotational base. Parallel to Atomic.
Set modifier that does NOT contribute ADD per Red pt6.
Set modifier adding +3 ADD per Red pt7/pt9.
Set modifier with 0 ADD per Red pt8. Held position; no plant.
Adds +1 to specific construction tricks (Atom Smasher per pt1). Narrow scope; not a broad modifier.
Inside cross-body delay surface; one of the foundational stalls.
Toe delay surface (top of foot).
Heel delay surface.

Reverse-direction prefix; same meaning as REV.

Opposite-foot indicator in semantic notation.

Set position: toe-stall surface used to start the trick.

Step on opposite side from the plant foot.
Inward arc direction (toward the body).
Outward arc direction (away from the body).

Backward direction. Fuses with WHIRL/SWIRL into a 2-token rotation variant.

A controlled-flick step contributing 1 to ADD. Foundational trick component.
